meta.title: Server-Side Validation with Server Actions
meta.description: Implement bulletproof validation using Next.js Server Actions and Zod

steps.title: Understanding the Pattern
steps.content: Server actions must validate all incoming data. Never trust client-side validation alone.
steps.hint: Server actions receive FormData or plain objects and return serializable data.

steps.title: Defining the Schema
steps.content: Create a Zod schema that defines your validation rules.

steps.title: Creating the Action Result Type
steps.content: Define a discriminated union for type-safe results.
steps.explanation: This pattern allows TypeScript to narrow the type based on the success property.

steps.title: Implementing the Server Action
steps.content: Build the complete server action with validation and error handling.
